channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish, 11th May
item.description:
Bags of rubbish have been left next to a public bin near this location. The foxes have ripped it open and or rubbish is strewn all across the pavement including used sanitary items.. This is the main road to Crofton school with loads of children walking past.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sick on the a bench seat- on footway along hadlow road, 11th May
item.description:
Sick on the a bench seat- on footway along hadlow road - caller says its near sharon court-
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hadlow Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corrugated iron wrapped in plastic dumped, 11th May
item.description:
This corrugated iron and plastic sheet has been dumped on Charlton Park Lane and has been there for a month. Although I’ve reported it and tape saying, environmental crime under investigation, has been wrapped around it, it still hasn’t been collected. Hazardous to pedestrians. Please collect.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large wooden box, container & bags on path, 11th May
item.description:
The weekly fly tipping on Charlton Park Lane has occurred. A large wooden container, with plastic containers inside & black bin bags of rubbish have been dumped on the pathway. This is hazardous to pedestrians, wildlife and unsightly too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish still in situ, 11th May
item.description:
This problem has been reported by residents on two previous occasions via this website on 04.05.2026. This is now a week and the rubbish has still not been removed. Please can this be collected forthwith as the next problem will be someone setting fire to it causing damage to property Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 286, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A lot of rubbish in public places in the area, 11th May
item.description:
A lot of rubbish thrown in various places in the area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gadwall Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting Bournemouth close litter, 11th May
item.description:
Please enforce against the landlord

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Bournemouth Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders rubble flytipped over the weekend, 11th May
item.description:
Flytipping has been taking place in Burford Gardens near the junction of Bourne Hill for many years. This is the largest pile of rubbish so far. Can this area be monitored in some way?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burford Gardens, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shattered glass all across pavement, 11th May
item.description:
Lots of big pieces of broken glass across the pavement behind lamp post asset id: B7 7 on Beckenham Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bag of garden waste, 11th May
item.description:
Please collect
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Graffiti visible on private property backing onto public pathway, 11th May
item.description:
Graffiti has appeared on the exterior wall of my neighbour’s house, which backs into the public pathway from Albany Close leading onto Crofton Avenue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, Crofton Avenue, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Usual Beatty Road fly tipping, 11th May
item.description:
Self explanatory

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Newton street across the road from aria house, 11th May
item.description:
Blue direction sign badly damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newton Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th May
item.description:
Constant fly tipping close to the old estate. No borough employee cleans up the area regularly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Weld Place, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left outside flats, 11th May
item.description:
More rubbish has been left next to these bins.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 176, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter problem on this street, 11th May
item.description:
Kingsdale Road has litter on the pavements and kerbs most days. Can it be cleaned more often please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsdale Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working, 11th May
item.description:
Not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food Waste on Truman’s Road, 11th May
item.description:
The commercial restaurant bins were emptied this morning and as seems to be a regular occurrence now, one must’ve ripped and has left food along the pavement which is attracting vermin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass/windows, construction fly tipping and boxes, 11th May
item.description:
Broken glass/windows, construction fly tipping and boxes on the pedestrian path next to the highway.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boyd Way, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on shopfront shutters, 11th May
item.description:
137 Well Street E9, graffiti on council owned shopfront shutters. Please arrange removal.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
